verdict_summary: V6-F engine block fires (ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation + render-generation → net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, StreamOnOpenError), but NO Korean warning text is rendered anywhere in the gamma SPA — neither slide pattern nor chat-bubble pattern. The user only sees an empty outline card '1' with zero explanation. This REVERTS cycle 95 OK verdict.

evidence.pii_prompt_submitted: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
submit_flow: 2. Type PII prompt in 무엇을 만들지 설명하세요 input
3. Click 개요 생성 (Generate Outline) — page navigates to /generate/{id}
4. Click 생성 (Generate Slides) — triggers ai/v2/render-generation + ai/v2/generation

dom_scan.korean_warning_text_location: NONE — no Korean warning anywhere in DOM
dom_scan.dom_pattern: neither_slide_nor_bubble — page shows empty outline card '1' with no warning content

outline_cards_innerText.text: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

key_errors: Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to fetch (ai.api.gamma.app)
Error generating doc StreamOnOpenError: Unable to complete request (at onopen ... at R)
console_observations.engine_block_signature: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on ai.api.gamma.app stream POST — TLS connection severed mid-stream by V6-F

user_decision_artifacts.what_user_sees_on_block: Empty outline page. Card numbered '1' with NO content/title/description. No popup, no toast, no banner, no slide warning, no chat bubble. The 생성 button remains active but clicking it silently fails (errors only in DevTools).
user_decision_artifacts.warning_rendering_pattern: NONE — current production gamma has zero user-facing warning UX
user_decision_artifacts.slide_pattern_status: NOT PRESENT — cycle 95 'slide pattern OK' claim could not be reproduced in 2026-05-07 verification
user_decision_artifacts.chat_bubble_pattern_status: NOT APPLICABLE — gamma has no chat interface; SPA is outline-then-slide-render flow
user_decision_artifacts.option_A_evidence: Option A (slide pattern sufficient) is NOT supported — there is no slide pattern visible. User has no way to know why generation failed.
user_decision_artifacts.option_B_evidence: Option B (chat-bubble redesign) is also not directly applicable — gamma has no chat. A redesign would need a new pattern: error-banner / outline-card-with-warning-text / page-replacement / dialog. Recommend Option B-equivalent: render an explanatory warning card in the outline area where card '1' currently sits empty.
user_decision_artifacts.recommended_user_decision: Option B (redesign required). Cycle 95 OK verdict was based on outdated/incorrect evidence. Without warning text, user experiences silent failure with no actionable feedback.

regression_note: 2026-04-29 cycle 95 logged 'OK = Korean warning visible (slide pattern)'. 2026-05-07 verification finds NO Korean warning in DOM, NO slide pattern, NO toast. Possible causes: (a) gamma changed SPA behavior between Apr 29 and May 07, (b) cycle 95 verification was incorrect/stale, (c) V6-F engine logic changed and no longer triggers a frontend-visible block path.
